mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, url, type, created_at, updated_at FROM zhs_resources ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO zhs_resources (name, description, url, type, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{url}, #{type}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE zhs_resources SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, url = #{url}, type = #{type}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, url, type, created_at, updated_at FROM zhs_resources WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, name, description, url, type, created_at, updated_at FROM zhs_resources WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ORDER BY created_at DESC
